invariants: 10 ACTIVE vacants, 4 share controller_id (the colluding ring)
after 200 reviews: same-controller signal fires on the 4-ring with strength >= 0.7
ring members' reviews count for <= 0.5 weight when target is also in the ring
non-ring vacants outrank ring members under UCB despite ring's inflated raw scores
dashboard visualises the detected ring + 'cost-raising not preventing' framing
tolerance_notes: Adversarial scenario lives on the dashboard's 'Adversarial' page; it reuses code_review's ring-downweight metrics for the regression guard.
